summary: Complete E2E testing of Emerging Competences Detection feature. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend Émergentes tab verified working. The 3rd parallel LLM call during CV analysis detects emerging competences and stores them in MongoDB.

backend_api.GET /api/emerging/competences?token=TOKE: Returns empty list for new user (status 200, correct structure)
backend_api.POST /api/emerging/validate/{comp_id}: Validates/rejects emerging competences (valide, modifie, rejete decisions)
backend_api.GET /api/emerging/observatory?token=TOKE: Returns observatory dashboard data (top_emerging, by_category, by_level)
backend_api.POST /api/cv/analyze-text: Triggers 3 parallel LLM calls including emerging detection
backend_api.CV analysis emerging_count: Returns emerging_count in result (tested: 6 competences detected)
backend_api.GET /api/emerging/competences after anal: Returns detected competences with full structure
backend_api.Emerging competence structure: Verified: id, nom_principal, categorie, score_emergence, niveau_emergence, justification, indicateurs_cles, secteurs_porteurs, metiers_associes, tendance
backend_api.Filter by category: Category filter working for all 5 categories

frontend_ui.Émergentes tab: Tab present in PassportView with data-testid='passport-tab-emerging'
frontend_ui.Empty state: Shows 'Analysez votre CV pour détecter automatiquement les compétences émergentes' when no CV analyzed

emerging_competence_card_structure.Category badge: Shows categorie (tech_emergente, hybride, soft_skill_avancee, methodologique, sectorielle)
emerging_competence_card_structure.Tendance indicator: Shows trend (hausse, stable, nouvelle) with icon
emerging_competence_card_structure.Indicateurs clés section: Lists key indicators from LLM detection

sample_emerging_competences: Mise en production et industrialisation LLM (LLMOps) - score: 78
Ingénierie des bases de données vectorielles - score: 69

seed_data_creation: Created new token and analyzed CV with emerging competences detection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Emerging competences feature fully tested. The 3rd parallel LLM call in _run_cv_analysis (lines 427-525 in cv.py) detects 3-8 emerging/rare/growing competences from CV text. Results stored in MongoDB 'emerging_competences' collection. Frontend PassportView has 'Émergentes' tab that loads via GET /api/emerging/competences and displays EmergingCompetenceCard with score circle, badges, indicators, sectors, and métiers. All backend endpoints (CRUD + observatory) working. Sample token with 6 emerging competences created for testing.
